Event: The Frosty Adventure
Event Date: 05/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E1
Floating Ice Engraving

Enhancement: 1
For the duration of the battle, the unit's physical armor is increased by 2% / 3% / 4% / 5% / 6% / 8% / 10% for each enemy in a small radius around the unit.
Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage to the target of the attack equal to 88% / 89% / 90% / 91% / 94% / 97% / 100% of own physical armor.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
For the duration of the battle, the unit's physical and magic armor is increased by 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% for each enemy in a large radius around the unit.
Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage to the target of the attack equal to 100% / 101% / 102% / 103% / 104% / 107% / 110% of own physical armor.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
For the duration of the battle, the unit's physical and magic armor is increased by 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 14% / 17% / 20% for each enemy on the battlefield.
Once in a while, the unit deals pure damage to the target of the attack equal to 109% / 110% / 111% / 112% / 114% / 117% / 120% of own physical armor.
